# Manifest of cmake-xray JSON report goldens (AP M5-1.2).
#
# Each non-comment, non-blank line names exactly one golden file in this
# directory. tests/validate_json_schema.py checks that the manifest and the
# directory contents agree, and validates each listed golden against
# spec/report-json.schema.json.
#
# Tranche A creates this manifest empty; Tranche C adds the analyze and
# impact goldens that lock the JSON contract in place.

# Analyze goldens
analyze_compile_db_only.json
analyze_file_api_build_dir.json
analyze_file_api_reply_dir.json
analyze_mixed_input.json
analyze_ranking_truncated.json
analyze_hotspot_truncated.json

# Impact goldens
impact_compile_db_relative.json
impact_file_api_relative.json
impact_mixed_input_relative.json
impact_absolute.json
impact_absolute_windows.json
